scripts.deploy: npm test && npm run build:frontend && node scripts/embed-dashboard.js && cd worker && wrangler deploy --env='' && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.deploy:worker: npm test && npm run build:frontend && node scripts/embed-dashboard.js && cd worker && wrangler deploy --env='' && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.deploy:preprod: node scripts/embed-dashboard.js && cd worker && wrangler deploy --env=preprod
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:frontend && npm run deploy:worker
